raw_consumer_statement: Exact details below. 2 charges for hotel were supposed to be in dispute. Barclays only put one in dispute and the hotel rebilled. We reached out to hotel which quickly reversed 2 charges, so things were fine until Barclays rebilled and sent letter. Numerous phone calls to Barclays always resulted in " this will be fixed sorry '' and so forth and nothing ever gets done. 6 phone calls, hours of going through phone prompts and repeating things to agents and it always ends in wait a few days. We are missing a XXXX credit and spent XXXX worth of time to not get it fixed and now more time to file this.
